theme_archetype.name: Swiss & High-Contrast
theme_archetype.reasoning: Personal safety requires extreme clarity, authority, and trust. A Swiss/High-Contrast approach ensures emergency actions are immediately visible while maintaining a serious, reliable tone. The Authority Dashboard intentionally shifts to Dark Mode for command-center low-light ops, avoiding the standard 'SaaS blue' in favor of high-alert Reds and deep Slates.

typography.import_instructions: Add Google Fonts imports for 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' to your HTML/CSS.

sizes.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-black text-zinc-950
sizes.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-bold text-zinc-900

buttons.primary: bg-rose-600 text-white font-bold hover:bg-rose-700 transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-950 text-white font-bold hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
buttons.sos_button: w-56 h-56 rounded-full bg-rose-600 text-white font-black text-3xl shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(225,29,72,0.5)] hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all flex items-center justify-center flex-col gap-2 relative overflow-hidden

forms.input: bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-200 rounded-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-500 focus:border-rose-500 transition-all p-3 w-full
forms.label: text-sm font-bold text-zinc-900 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block

hero_abstract.description: Abstract minimalist 3D frosted glass dome representing AI protection. Use in the hero section right side or as a background for the login card.

trust_security.description: Macro photography of brushed titanium metal. Use as a background for the Trust & Security section.

live_tracking_map.description: Close-up of a car dashboard showing a GPS navigation screen. Use for the 'Live Location Tracking' feature showcase.

safe_walk_city.description: Stylish young woman walking on illuminated city street at night. Use for 'Real-Time Protection' imagery.

landing_page.nav: Sticky header (Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40). Logo left, links center, CTA right.
landing_page.hero: Bento Grid Mode A. Left (col-span-12 lg:col-span-7): Huge H1 'Your Safety. Powered by AI.', stats list. Right (col-span-12 lg:col-span-5): Embed the 'Secure Access' login card here floating over the 'hero_abstract' image using Glassmorphism. Ensure the login card has role selection (User, Admin, Authority).
landing_page.how_it_works: 3-column grid, generous padding. Large watermark numbers (text-8xl text-zinc-100 font-black absolute -z-10 -top-4 -left-4) behind the step text.
landing_page.features: Bento grid. Use high-contrast solid cards. Red accents for SOS/Threat detection features.
landing_page.real_time_protection: Split section. Image of 'safe_walk_city' with overlapping 'live_tracking_map' in a floating card, demonstrating the UI.
landing_page.trust_security: Dark section using 'trust_security' image as background with black/80 overlay. White text, badges for ISO/GDPR.
landing_page.footer: Dark background (#09090B), high contrast white text. Include newsletter and contact form here.

user_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Clean white/gray background (Light Mode).
user_dashboard.hero_widget: Central massive SOS button. Use Framer Motion for a press-and-hold animation (progress ring filling up over 3 seconds).
user_dashboard.sidebar: Live location toggle, emergency contacts list, recent alerts history.

authority_dashboard.layout: Forced Dark Mode overrides. Control Room Grid. Tight gaps. Background #09090B.
authority_dashboard.sidebar_feed: col-span-1 h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] overflow-y-auto border-r border-zinc-800. List of active SOS alerts. High-threat alerts have red borders and pulsing dots.
authority_dashboard.main_map: col-span-3 h-full bg-zinc-950 flex flex-col items-center justify-center. Use a dark-themed map component (or placeholder styling representing a map) with red markers for incidents.

motion_interactions.sos_hold: Use Framer Motion. whileTap scales down to 0.95. A circular progress bar should fill up over 3 seconds to trigger the actual alert, preventing accidental presses.
motion_interactions.hover_states: Buttons shift background color. Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and gain stronger shadow.
motion_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in on load using framer-motion (opacity: 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0).

accessibility.test_ids: MANDATORY. e.g., data-testid='sos-trigger-btn', data-testid='login-role-select', data-testid='nav-login-link', data-testid='auth-alert-item'
accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text over images uses proper overlays (min black/50) or text-shadow. Red alert text on dark mode must be at least #FCA5A5 for readability against dark backgrounds.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all interface icons (ShieldAlert, MapPin, Video, RadioReceiver, PhoneCall). Install if not present.
